query: DELETE cg FROM call_grades cg INNER JOIN calls c ON cg.callId = c.id INNER JOIN (SELECT batchDialerCallId, MIN(id) as minId FROM calls WHERE batchDialerCallId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY batchDialerCallId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dupes ON c.batchDialerCallId = dupes.batchDialerCallId WHERE c.id != dupes.minId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute DELETE cg FROM call_grades cg INNER JOIN calls c ON cg.callId = c.id INNER JOIN (SELECT batchDialerCallId, MIN(id) as minId FROM calls WHERE batchDialerCallId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY batchDialerCallId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dupes ON c.batchDialerCallId = dupes.batchDialerCallId WHERE c.id != dupes.minId;
